Title: Test Appartiene a association
Preconditions: A Compito, Emergenza, and Utente exist
Test Data:
- Compito id: 1
- Emergenza idEmergenza: 1
- Utente idUtente: 1
Test Steps:
1. Associate the Compito with the Emergenza and the Utente
2. Verify that the Compito, Emergenza, and Utente are associated correctly
Expected Result: - The Compito, Emergenza, and Utente are associated correctly

Title: Test Appartiene a disassociation
Preconditions: A Compito, Emergenza, and Utente are associated
Test Steps:
1. Disassociate the Compito from the Emergenza and the Utente
2. Verify that the Compito, Emergenza, and Utente are disassociated correctly
Expected Result: - The Compito, Emergenza, and Utente are disassociated correctly

Title: Test Risguarda association
Test Steps:
1. Associate the Utente with another Utente
2. Verify that the Utente is associated correctly

Title: Test Risguarda disassociation
Test Steps:
1. Disassociate the Utente from the associated Utente
2. Verify that the Utente is disassociated correctly

Title: Test Coordinate association
Test Steps:
1. Associate the Utente with another Utente
2. Verify that the Utente is associated correctly

Title: Test Coordinate disassociation
Test Steps:
1. Disassociate the Utente from the associated Utente
2. Verify that the Utente is disassociated correctly

Title: Test Svolto da association
Preconditions: A Svolto and a Utente exist
Test Steps:
1. Associate the Svolto with the Utente
2. Verify that the Svolto is associated correctly

Title: Test Svolto da disassociation
Preconditions: A Svolto and a Utente are associated
Test Steps:
1. Disassociate the Svolto from the Utente
2. Verify that the Svolto is disassociated correctly
